name: ai-proctoring
description: To run the project  step 1:- run backend   1) venv\scripts\activate   2) make sure you have downloaded the YOLO configuration, weights and class      files (e.g. ``yolov3.cfg``, ``yolov3.weights`` and ``coco.names``) and      place them in the project root or update the paths in ``main.py``.   3) python main.py
